The '''star''' of the [[Karthakk system]] was orbited by three planets.

In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] known as [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] was engulfed by the star after being forced into an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and sent flying toward it. The seemingly-invincible [[Gen'Dai/Legends|Gen'Dai]] was disintegrated by the star's intense heat.

Karthakk provided light to the nearby [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], [[Maramere]], and [[Nod Kartha]].
